name: just-feedback
description: Self-hosted feedback collection for mobile apps

scripts.build: npm run build -w @codelionapps/server && npm run build -w @codelionapps/react-native
scripts.test: npm run test -w @codelionapps/server && npm run test -w @codelionapps/panel && npm run test -w @codelionapps/react-native
scripts.release: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run verify:packages && changeset publish
